Home / Products / Gravure Printing Machine

Gravure Printing Machine

Gravure Printing Machine is configured for PVC, PE, BOPP, CPP, flexible film and cloth. Quotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

Technical specifications

MaterialPVC, PE, BOPP, CPP, flexible film and cloth
Voltage / frequency380 V, 50 Hz
Country / regionQuotations are usually prepared in USD. Electrical configuration is confirmed against the local plant supply before production.

Buyer keywords

gravure printing machine, PVC film printing machine, flexible packaging printing machine, BOPP film gravure printer
